## 🧠 About Me

<img align="right" alt="Boy Coding" width="320" src="https://media.giphy.com/media/qgQUggAC3Pfv687qPC/giphy.gif"/>

```yaml
name: Farhan Gouri
role: Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer
vibe: gothic · focused · builder
focus:
  - AI-powered web applications
  - Scalable backend systems
  - Production-ready features
  - Clean APIs & microservices
currently:
  - 🔭 Building real-world AI products
  - 🌱 Deepening Python + FastAPI + GCP
  - ⚡ Exploring LLM integrations & AI agents
philosophy: "Ship fast. Build well. Learn always."
```

<br clear="right"/>

<img src="https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/73097560/115834477-dbab4500-a447-11eb-908a-139a6edaec5c.gif">

## 🚀 Featured Projects

<div align="center">

| 🎥 Meet AI | 💰 Get Me A Chai | 🎶 Strings |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| AI-Powered Video Meetings | Creator Crowdfunding | Music Community |
| [![Live](https://img.shields.io/badge/🔗_Live-00d4ff?style=flat-square)](https://meetai-puce.vercel.app) | [![Live](https://img.shields.io/badge/🔗_Live-10b981?style=flat-square)](https://get-me-a-chai-89aq.vercel.app) | [![Live](https://img.shields.io/badge/🔗_Live-7c3aed?style=flat-square)](https://strings-phi.vercel.app/) |
| Next.js · tRPC · PostgreSQL | Next.js 15 · MongoDB · Razorpay | React · Express · WebSockets |
| Stream Video SDK · AI Agents | NextAuth · Tailwind | MongoDB · Tailwind |

</div>

<br/>

<details>
<summary><b>🎥 Meet AI — AI-Powered Video Meeting Platform</b></summary>
<br/>

> Full-stack AI-powered video meeting platform with intelligent AI agents

- ⚡ Real-time video calling using **Stream Video SDK**
- 🤖 AI agents that **automatically join and assist** live meetings
- 🔐 Secure authentication and **role-based access control**
- 🗄️ Scalable relational schemas for meetings, agents, recordings & transcripts

**Tech:** `Next.js` `React` `TypeScript` `Node.js` `tRPC` `Drizzle ORM` `PostgreSQL` `Stream Video SDK` `Tailwind CSS`

**🔗 [View Live](https://meetai-puce.vercel.app)**

</details>

<details>
<summary><b>💰 Get Me A Chai — Crowdfunding Platform</b></summary>
<br/>

> Production-ready crowdfunding platform for creators

- 🔐 Secure authentication using **NextAuth**
- 💳 Integrated **Razorpay** for real-time payments
- 📱 Responsive UI with smooth UX
- 🔄 CI/CD deployment on Vercel

**Tech:** `Next.js 15` `React` `Node.js` `MongoDB` `NextAuth.js` `Razorpay` `Tailwind CSS`

**🔗 [View Live](https://get-me-a-chai-89aq.vercel.app)**

</details>

<details>
<summary><b>🎶 Strings — Music Genre Community Platform</b></summary>
<br/>

> Real-time chat community platform for music genre discussions

- 💬 **WebSocket-based** real-time messaging
- 🧵 Organized forums with threaded conversations
- 🔧 Backend APIs for chat, users & forum management

**Tech:** `React.js` `Next.js` `Node.js` `Express.js` `MongoDB` `WebSockets` `Tailwind CSS`

**🔗 [View Live](https://strings-phi.vercel.app/)**

</details>

<img src="https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/73097560/115834477-dbab4500-a447-11eb-908a-139a6edaec5c.gif">

## 🐍 Contribution Snake

<div align="center">

![Snake animation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/menacefg78/menacefg78/output/github-contribution-grid-snake-dark.svg)

</div>

<details>
<summary><b>⚡ First time? Click to set up the Snake (2 min)</b></summary>
<br/>

1. In your `menacefg78` repo → **Settings → Actions → General**
2. Under **Workflow permissions** → select **"Read and write permissions"** → Save
3. Create `.github/workflows/snake.yml`:

```yaml
name: Generate Snake
on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 0 * * *"
  workflow_dispatch:
jobs:
  generate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: Platane/snk@v3
        with:
          github_user_name: menacefg78
          outputs: dist/github-contribution-grid-snake-dark.svg
      - uses: crazy-max/ghaction-github-pages@v3
        with:
          target_branch: output
          build_dir: dist
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
```

4. **Actions tab** → **"Generate Snake"** → **"Run workflow"** → Done! 🐍

</details>

<img src="https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/73097560/115834477-dbab4500-a447-11eb-908a-139a6edaec5c.gif">
